title: Vizhigalil Vizhundhavalo Lyrics Pugazh Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Pugazh Vizhigalil Vizhundhavalo Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Vivek – Mervin, Hariharan, Chitra & Vivek Siva

En Vizhigalil vizhundhavano
Enakaaga pirandhavano
En nenjukul nuzhaindhavano
En moochu kaatru ivano

En Vizhigalil vizhundhavalo
Enakaaga pirandhavalo
En nenjukul nuzhaindhavalo
En moochu kaatru ivalo

Ivan paarkaamal sirikaamal mudiyadhu naatkal
Ivan ketkaamal rasikaamal sirikaadhu siru pookal
Ivan dhaan yaaro theriyaadho verikaadha kangal
Ini naan pogum pinnale
thodar thodar thodar thodar thodargiradho!

Enakaaga pirandhaye penne
Enakulle inaithaaye unnai
Piriyadha varam ketpen anbe anbe
Unaaaga thandheyney ennai
Uyiruku uyiraana unnai
Nodi kooda piriyaamal kaapen anbe

Ada azhagendraal adhu ival dhaano
Ada azhagin azhagu madhi ival dhaano
Pen endral aval thaai dhaano
En thaayin anbum ivalo
Uyir endral adhu nee dhane
En uyirin uyirum adhu needhane
Unnale naan pen aanen
Ada enakul vetkam tholaithen

Endrum unnodu irundhaal adhu podhum
Sorgangal enadhaagume anbe
Indru ennoda uyire ponaalum
Un madiyil dhaan pogume

En Vizhigalil vizhundhavano
Enakaaga pirandhavano
En nenjukul nuzhaindhavano
En moochu kaatru ivano

Enakaaga pirandhavalo
En nenjukul nuzhaindhavalo
En moochu kaatru ivalo

Ivan dhaan yaaro theriyaadho verikaadha kangal
Ini naan pogum pinnale
thodar thodar thodar thodar thodargiradho!

Enakulle inaithaaye unnai
Piriyadha varam ketpen anbe anbe

Nodi kooda piriyaamal kaapen anbe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting on the beauty of cherished memories.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Pugazh, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, enhancing the emotional depth of the scene.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Chithra, Hariharan, and Vivek Siva.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music director for this song is currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 12, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vizhigalil Vizhundhavalo, the singers beautifully express the emotions of love and reminiscence. The song serves as a backdrop to a significant romantic moment in Pugazh, highlighting the characters' feelings and connections. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This enchanting duet resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vizhigalil Vizhundhavalo from the Pugazh movie is a mesmerizing blend of heartfelt lyrics and enchanting melodies. Featuring the soulful voices of Chithra, Hariharan, and Vivek Siva, this song captures the essence of love and nostalgia. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that resonates with every listener's heart.
stanzaMeanings: Did my eyes fall for you? Were you born for me? Did you enter my heart? Is this breeze showing me you?
Did my eyes fall for you? Were you born for me? Did you enter my heart? Is this breeze showing me her?

Without seeing him, these days cannot smile. Without hearing him, these small flowers cannot laugh. Who knows who he is? Don't let your eyes wander. Now, after I leave, will it continue, continue, continue, continue?
You were born for me, girl. You are within me. I ask for the blessing of never being apart, dear. You are my life, my soul. I will protect you without separation, dear.

Is it her beauty that is shining? Is it her beauty that is bright? Is a girl just like her a mother? Is my mother's love like her? Life means you, and my soul means you. Because of you, I have become a woman. Oh, I have lost my shame.
Being with you is enough. It feels like heaven, dear. Even if my life goes away today, it will still remain in your lap.
Did my eyes fall for you? Were you born for me? Did you enter my heart? Is this breeze showing me you?
Did my eyes fall for you? Were you born for me? Did you enter my heart? Is this breeze showing me her?

Without seeing him, these days cannot smile. Without hearing him, these small flowers cannot laugh. Who knows who he is? Don't let your eyes wander. Now, after I leave, will it continue, continue, continue, continue?
You were born for me, girl. You are within me. I ask for the blessing of never being apart, dear. You are my life, my soul. I will protect you without separation, dear.
Did my eyes fall for you? Were you born for me? Did you enter my heart? Is this breeze showing me you?
